svg.title: THE ust CLI — ONE ENTRYPOINT, THE WHOLE SURFACE
svg.desc: The ust CLI — one entrypoint, the whole command surface (parsed from the real binary’s help). Install with npm i -g @ust-protocol/cli. The 10 subcommands: verify <file|-> (verify a transcript (exit 0 = VALID, 1 = not; --require-anchored floors at TOP)); canon <file|-> (print canonical bytes + hash (cross-language diff)); genesis --domain <d> (run the HIGH genesis ceremony (add --publish cf for one-click serving)); rotate --domain <d> --root <enc> (APPEND a key rotation to the served log (never re-mint; old docs stay valid)); discovery <domain> (attest the §20.1 serving contract (any infra)); publish cf --domain <d> --genesis <f> (deploy the CF serving adapter for an existing genesis); mirror <domain> (publish + attest a SECOND-vendor mirror (§20.1 vendor-independence)); stream <frames…> (RANGE verdict: chain · forks · completeness (needs --checkpoint for proven)); forkchoice <docs…> (pick the CANONICAL doc among candidates for ONE ust_id (canonical = anchor-included)); witness rekor --domain <d> (log the genesis in a transparency log → automatic no-fork (#68)). Exit 0 = VALID with the tier in the verdict, 1 = not; the ceremony self-verifies its outputs, fail-closed.

g.text: THE ust CLI — ONE ENTRYPOINT, THE WHOLE SURFACE
# 10 subcommands — this table is parsed from the real help
verify a transcript (exit 0 = VALID, 1 = not; --require-anchored floors at TOP)
run the HIGH genesis ceremony (add --publish cf for one-click serving)
APPEND a key rotation to the served log (never re-mint; old docs stay valid)
deploy the CF serving adapter for an existing genesis
publish + attest a SECOND-vendor mirror (§20.1 vendor-independence)
RANGE verdict: chain · forks · completeness (needs --checkpoint for proven)
pick the CANONICAL doc among candidates for ONE ust_id (canonical = anchor-included)
log the genesis in a transparency log → automatic no-fork (#68)
exit 0 = VALID (tier in the verdict) · 1 = not · the ceremony self-verifies its outputs — fail-closed
